# ManagedApplicationConfigurationCommand

**Device Management Command**

The command to get app configurations from managed apps on a device.

## Declaration

```swift
object ManagedApplicationConfigurationCommand
```

## Objects

- **ManagedApplicationConfigurationCommand.Command**: The command to get app configurations from managed apps on a device.

## Commands and responses

- **ManagedApplicationConfigurationResponse**: A response from the device after it processes the command to get app configurations from managed apps on a device.
